title: Failed Breeding
description: A simple mod that gives mobs a chance to fail at breeding!
body:
This mod simply adds a 10% chance for mobs to fail at breeding!

A small balance feature to make breeding slightly less easy but not ruin it fully.

This mod can either be on the client or server.
To be clear it _must_ be a server side mod to work on a server.

Check out my [discord](
https://discord.gg/Avc2MccaqP) if you have any issues with it <3
